headline: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Darden Restaurants Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
summary: Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) will release Q4 earnings on June 25. Analysts expect $3.64 EPS and $3.73B revenue. Analysts have a positive rating with an accuracy rate of 53-74%.
